fields.description:
# Add the close-time plan-review gate

## Goal
Prevent an implemented ticket from closing after its own plan or a pinned upstream plan changed during execution, without running plan review inside close or invalidating every implementation because code files changed.

## Implementation
- In transition_close.close_ticket(), after structural prechecks and before completion verification, call compute_validity(profile=close) only when verify.require_plan_review_for_close is true. This is separate from the completion-verifier gate; pin drift invalidates only when verify.enforce_plan_material_pins is also true. Repeat the same close-profile check under the write lock before STATUS append.
- Add verify.require_plan_review_for_close with default false.
- Call the validity story's compute_validity close profile for task, story, and epic close operations. It requires certified phase compatibility plus current own material; it enforces pins only when enforce_plan_material_pins is on. Do not duplicate phase or pin comparison in transition code.
- Deliberately exclude per-file dependency hashes and whole-HEAD/code freshness from the close validity profile. Implementation changes to file-impact files do not themselves require another plan review.
- Run no plan-review LLM during close. On failure, return derived reasons and direct the agent to run review-plan separately before retrying.
- Keep bugs, session logs, code reviews, identities, and idea-to-closed transitions exempt, matching the claim-gate scope.
- Make the existing non-empty force-close reason bypass both completion verification and this gate with the existing audit trail; never bypass structural child-closure rules.
- Precheck plan-review validity before the completion LLM, then recheck under the store write lock immediately before STATUS is appended.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] When require_plan_review_for_close is enabled, CLOSE-profile invalidity blocks before completion verification.
- [ ] Pin drift blocks CLOSE only when enforce_plan_material_pins is also enabled.
- [ ] Enabled close enforcement accepts only certified, phase-compatible, material-and-pin-current reviews for task/story/epic and performs no plan-review LLM call.
- [ ] Code/HEAD drift alone does not block close, while plan material or enforced pin drift does; errors provide actionable review-plan remediation.
- [ ] A phase-incompatible attestation blocks close with review-plan remediation even when pin enforcement is disabled.
- [ ] Exemptions, force-close audit behavior, structural child closure, precheck ordering, and locked recheck races have interface-level tests.

## Verification
- Run focused transition, gate-failure-matrix, and lifecycle interface tests.
- Run make check and the non-integration test suite.
